name: revit_list_path_of_travel_doors
description: Lists door marks crossed by path-of-travel elements in traversal order.

path_of_travel_ids.description: Element ids of path-of-travel elements to analyze

notes: Current implementation uses interactive pick or pre-selection and requires an active floor plan view plus a 3D view for ReferenceIntersector. Refactor to accept path_of_travel_ids for headless MCP execution.
